dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I need to tell you something I've never told anyone. Something I did years ago that I can't stop thinking about.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: When {location} was under attack by {enemy_type}, I ran. I was supposed to hold the eastern gate with {target_npc}, but I abandoned my post and fled into the forest. {target_npc} held the gate alone and was badly injured because of it. They survived, but they moved to another settlement {location_hint} and haven't spoken to me since. I've been gathering {quest_item} as a peace offering, but I can't face them alone. The road there is dangerous: {enemy_type} own the passes now, and I'm not the fighter I should have been.
dialogueChunks.outro: I don't deserve forgiveness. But I need to try, or this guilt will eat me alive.

playerResponses.text: It takes courage to face what you did. I'll walk that road with you.
Cowardice has consequences. But so does trying to make it right. I'll help.
You abandoned someone in battle. That's not something a delivery can fix.

dialogueChunks.intro: I won't lie to you, {player_name}. What I'm about to ask you to help me with started because I did something unforgivable.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Years ago, when my family was starving, I stole {quest_item} from {target_npc}'s household. It was a family heirloom, irreplaceable, and I sold it to a trader who took it {location_hint}. I've carried that secret like a stone in my chest ever since. {target_npc} still searches for it, still offers rewards for its return. The trader's camp is in {enemy_type} territory now, and nobody else would risk the journey. But I need to get it back and return it, even if it means confessing what I did.
dialogueChunks.outro: I stole from someone who trusted me. The least I can do is risk my pride to give it back.

playerResponses.text: Returning what you stole is the right first step. I'll help you take it.
Theft and guilt and dangerous territory. At least you're honest about it. I'm in.
You made your choices. Live with them.

dialogueChunks.intro: I lied, {player_name}. In front of the whole council, under oath, I lied. And an innocent person lost everything because of it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The council asked me if I saw {target_npc} take supplies from the storehouse. I said yes, because the real thief was my cousin and I was protecting family. {target_npc} was exiled from {location} and has been living rough {location_hint} ever since. My cousin died last winter, and now there's nobody left to protect. I need to find {target_npc} and bring them {quest_item} as proof of what really happened. But the {enemy_type} have overrun the area where {target_npc} was last seen, and I'm terrified of what I'll find.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every day that passes with {target_npc} in exile is another day my lie draws breath. Help me kill it.

playerResponses.text: An innocent person exiled by a lie deserves the truth. I'll help you find them.
You destroyed someone's life with false testimony. But trying to fix it counts for something.
Your guilty conscience isn't my problem.
